technical_extracted_items.text: Original URLs stored in the mappings table must be encrypted at rest using AES-256.
technical_extracted_items.rationale: URLs may incidentally contain personally identifying or session tokens.

technical_extracted_items.text: Transport: HTTPS only on all public endpoints; HTTP requests redirect to HTTPS.
Observability: structured JSON logs to stdout; logs ingested by the platform's standard log aggregator.
Persistence: Postgres 16+ on a single managed instance.
Runtime: a single containerised service; no microservices.
